subject: refactor(import): remove ID dependencies from import/merge pipeline
body:
Arcs now stay title-referenced throughout the entire import pipeline.
IDs are only resolved at the final DB insertion step in getApprovedItems().

- Delete resolveArcEndpointsByTitle() — arcs no longer converted to ID-space
- Update buildImportWarnings() to check by title instead of node ID
- Replace nodeIdMap in buildMergeProposal() with titleToExistingId map
- Replace idRemap in getApprovedItems() with titleToFinalId map
- Update exportToJson() to export arc endpoints as titles, not UUIDs
- Update 58 tests across import and merge service suites

Pipeline simplified from:
  JSON(titles) → resolveByTitle(→IDs) → mergeProposal(nodeIdMap) → getApproved(idRemap) → DB
To:
  JSON(titles) → mergeProposal(titleToExistingId) → getApproved(titleToFinalId) → DB

Tags: import, merge, refactor, phase-import
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: remove-import-ids
Semver: minor

title: remove ID dependencies from import/merge pipeline
